items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided does not include any specific checks or validations related to the rate limiting on auth endpoints as required by the exploratory step. While the expected result mentions confirming scenario behavior or producing a failure report, there are no traces or snapshots captured that demonstrate the outcome of the rate limiting scenario. This lack of concrete evidence leads to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this exploratory step.
